title: MD-102 Execute device enrollment
summary: This learning path will cover Microsoft Entra join and will introduce Microsoft Endpoint Manager. We'll also discuss how to configure policies for enrolling devices to Configuration Manager and Microsoft Intune.

sections.title: MD-102 Execute device enrollment
sections.summary: This learning path will cover Microsoft Entra join and will introduce Microsoft Endpoint Manager. We'll also discuss how to configure policies for enrolling devices to Configuration Manager and Microsoft Intune.

lessons.title: Manage device authentication
lessons.content_md:
In this module, you learn about device authentication and management in Microsoft Entra ID. MD-102

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/administer-device-authentication/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Enroll devices using Microsoft Configuration Manager
lessons.content_md:
This module introduces students to client deployment options and some of the high-level management and monitoring options that are available using Configuration Manager

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/enroll-devices-use-endpoint-configuration-manager/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Enroll devices using Microsoft Configuration Manager

lessons.title: Enroll devices using Microsoft Intune
lessons.content_md:
Students will learn how to configure and setup Intune to more easily manage Windows, Android, and iOS devices.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/enroll-devices-use-intune/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica MD-102 Execute device enrollment
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **MD-102 Execute device enrollment**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
